subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and whatsoever thou didst mention in remembrance of the Beloved of all worlds hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و آنچه در ذکر محبوب عالمیان معروض داشتی شنیده شد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
